---
title: "Jasmin Paris: First Woman to Finish Barkley Marathons"
description: "Jasmin Paris, 40, scientist and mother of two, becomes the first woman to finish the Barkley Marathons 100-Mile in its 38-year history — 59:58:21."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-03-22"
categories: [running, ultra, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Jasmin Paris finishes the Barkley Marathons. Image: Outside / LinkedIn. ([Source](https://run.outsideonline.com/news/barkley-marathons-2024-results/))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Jasmin Paris, 40-year-old scientist from University of Edinburgh and mother of two, becomes the first woman to finish one of the most grueling ultramarathons, Barkley Marathons 100 Miles, in its 38-year history. Her time was 59:58:21.

<https://run.outsideonline.com/news/barkley-marathons-2024-results/>

(only 22 runners finished the race in its entire history)

From <https://apple.news/AjmdCUjSIS-6rI5rckKbY6w> about Barkley Marathons:

"… the Frozen Head course forms a savage roller-coaster ride, with an average elevation change of 3,280 feet every six miles. This amounts to a total elevation gain of 65,616 feet—more than twice the height of Mount Everest—over the 124-mile course. The ceaseless climbing and descending, combined with the navigational maze, make Barkley so difficult, …"

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_jasmin-paris-becomes-first-woman-to-finish-activity-7177163584047575041-t2Mu).*
